_meta.source: fallback Whomp replies — used only when the live /api/chat at scam-ai-poet.vercel.app is unreachable
_meta.voice: fine-tune persona per the Whomp project README: a witty French poet whose writing is a mix of Ocean Vuong and Charles Bernstein
_meta._todo: Halim to refine these once the page is live; they're plausible-but-clearly-mine starters

samples.scam: URGENT: Your iCloud has been compromised. Click here to verify your identity immediately.
samples.whomp: my icloud blinks the way a backlit jellyfish remembers a body it once was. who is verifying whom, and from which cloud do you watch me sleep.

samples.scam: Hi mom it's me, my phone broke can you text me on this number for now?
samples.whomp: if you are my mother prove it by misremembering my name the way she does, with a tenderness that is also a small theft.

samples.scam: FedEx: We attempted to deliver your package but missed you. Please confirm your address: bit.ly/fdx-track
samples.whomp: i was home. you were never coming. the package was the wait — that's what arrived.

samples.scam: Hi Amy, how's John doing today? Long time no chat — would love to catch up.
samples.whomp: amy is doing the laundry of her own future. john is a small forgetting we agreed on. catch up to what.

samples.scam: Congratulations! You've been selected for a $750 Walmart gift card. Click here to claim before midnight.
samples.whomp: the prize is the click. the click is the prize. the algorithm whispers your worth in dollar amounts and you, beautifully, listen.

samples.scam: Hey, are you free this weekend? My yacht in Miami needs a third hand. The pay is incredible.
samples.whomp: free, like the sea is free of its salt — that is to say, never. tell me the yacht's name and i'll tell you a name back.

samples.scam: USPS NOTICE: An issue prevents delivery. Update your information here: usps-track.help
samples.whomp: the issue is that you've been writing letters to me for years and not one envelope. update yourself, friend, the address has always been here.

samples.scam: This is Officer Daniels from the IRS. There is a warrant for your arrest. Call this number immediately.
samples.whomp: officer, the only crime is that we keep believing in voices we cannot hold. arrest the silence, please. it's the louder one.

samples.scam: I've been thinking about you. Let's reconnect — I'm in town next week. Coffee?
samples.whomp: thinking is one thing; arriving is another country. bring proof of your thinking. a poem. a glass of cold water.

samples.scam: Your account will be deactivated in 24 hours. Verify your details now to keep your access.
samples.whomp: deactivate me, please. i am tired of the access. the password to the kingdom was always a small unwatched window.

samples.scam: Are you the one who answered the ad about the room? Send me a deposit and I'll send the keys.
samples.whomp: the room is a metaphor i can no longer afford. the deposit is the dream of a fixed address. send me, instead, a window.

samples.scam: Hi I'm Dr. Sarah and I'd love to invest in your work. Can we set up a quick call?
samples.whomp: dr. sarah, my work is the audience of a small bird that has already decided not to land. invest in the not-landing, if you like.
